allowed_work: compare hypotheses against future certified evidence
forbidden_work: blend experiment evidence into normal scores
delete gates without a shadow-test replacement
agent_brief.hard_rule: Do not change bot config, route policy, registry phase, score weights, or gates directly.

top_hypotheses.next_action: Do not promote. Schedule a certified-normal confirmation test.
top_hypotheses.title: Confirm positive candidate: Short Genesis

top_hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_hypotheses.title: Morning profit decay guard

top_hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_hypotheses.title: Bottom-channel gap-highway long

top_hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.

top_hypotheses.next_action: Review for deletion, demotion, or a smaller shadow-only variant.
top_hypotheses.title: Delete or tighten weak trader: Short Universe

blocked_reasons: daily certification is EXPERIMENT_ONLY; AI output is research only

evidence.reason: EXPERIMENT_ONLY day; promising evidence stays shadow/research until a certified-normal day confirms it

hypotheses.kill_criteria: If the next certified-normal day is negative or contract-incomplete, keep it shadow-only.
hypotheses.mechanism: Use a certified-normal forward day to separate real panel edge from open-gate experiment noise.
hypotheses.next_action: Do not promote. Schedule a certified-normal confirmation test.
hypotheses.promotion_target: PAPER_LIVE -> BOT_CANDIDATE/PAPER_LIVE only through promotion gate.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Keep short_genesis shadow/live-paper tracked; require fresh traces and compare next certified-normal day against current experiment evidence.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: Short Genesis may contain positive edge, but current evidence is not allowed to promote because the day is EXPERIMENT_ONLY.
hypotheses.title: Confirm positive candidate: Short Genesis

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Retire if runner opportunity lost exceeds protected drawdown after 30 closed trades.
hypotheses.mechanism: Early auction edges decay when first-hour trend fails, while true runners should keep making higher lows or hold above VWAP/opening range.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL only; never modify live exits without exit-intent trace proof.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Shadow-grade an exit overlay that banks partial gains after first-hour failure, but leaves a runner only when opening-range/VWAP structure remains intact.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: The bot often gives back early gains; a session-aware exit rule may preserve small daily wins without killing true runners.
hypotheses.title: Morning profit decay guard

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Retire or tighten if 20 shadow picks produce avg ghost R <= 0, or if top-channel collisions outperform lower-location picks.
hypotheses.mechanism: Auction location creates asymmetric inventory: lower-rail buyers can reload against nearby invalidation while overhead gap supply is still far enough away to offer a clean reward path.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: SHADOW_PANEL -> BOT_CANDIDATE only after 3 separate days and at least 20 clean ghost picks.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Emit a shadow pick only when channel_percentile <= 35, room_to_gap_above_r >= 1.5, nearest_gap_above_distance_pct is not immediate, and nearest_gap_below or lower rail defines a tight invalidation.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: Longs work better when price is near the lower channel rail with clean room to the next overhead gap, and fail more often when entry is already near the upper rail or pressed into overhead gap supply.
hypotheses.title: Bottom-channel gap-highway long

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Retire if options agreement fails to improve avg R over gap-only picks after 30 clean shadow samples.
hypotheses.mechanism: Structural price memory identifies where auction inventory may reload; options open interest and IV pressure may identify where hedging/pin flows slow or accelerate the move.
hypotheses.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
hypotheses.promotion_target: RESEARCH_NOTE -> SHADOW_PANEL after options context is non-null and freshness is contract-validated.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Shadow-score every options-aware pick with highway_agreement: aligned, conflicted, or unknown; do not trade the options signal alone.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: A long has higher follow-through when gap/channel room and options pressure agree, and lower follow-through when options pin/call-wall pressure sits directly in the gap highway.
hypotheses.title: Options and gaps clear-highway agreement

evidence.reason: EXPERIMENT_ONLY day; weak evidence can be reviewed for deletion/demotion, not normal learning

hypotheses.kill_criteria: Delete if no narrower mechanism can be specified in one sentence and tested with clean context.
hypotheses.mechanism: Negative edge with enough samples is usually a spec problem, gate problem, or panel trying to trade the wrong location/regime.
hypotheses.next_action: Review for deletion, demotion, or a smaller shadow-only variant.
hypotheses.proposed_experiment: Create a deletion review for short_universe_breakdown; if kept, require a narrower setup definition and a new shadow partition.
hypotheses.safety_policy: AI may propose; spine must admit, shadow-test, certify, and promotion-gate before any bot effect.
hypotheses.thesis: Short Universe is showing weak evidence and should be treated as a deletion/tightening candidate, not a thing to rescue emotionally.
hypotheses.title: Delete or tighten weak trader: Short Universe

ai_may_not: blend experiment evidence into normal scores
learning_rules.promotion_path: Hypothesis -> experiment admission -> shadow/paper evidence -> daily certification -> promotion gate -> human approval.

operator_read: AI learning produced 5 research hypotheses; none can affect the bot without admission and certified forward evidence.

evidence.reason: EXPERIMENT_ONLY day; promising evidence stays shadow/research until a certified-normal day confirms it
